type.description: The organism type, e.g. Bug, Fish, Plant, Reptile.

move_set.description: A list of descriptive moves or abilities for the organism.

description.description: Short flavor text describing the organism and how it fits into its environment.

environment_role.description: How the organism impacts its ecosystem.

art_prompt.description: A Stable Diffusion prompt for generating the card art.

rarity.description: Rarity tier such as Common, Uncommon, Rare, or Legendary.

image_assets.description: List of generated image filenames or asset references.

related_forms.description: Names of related organism forms, such as baby/adult or lifecycle stages.

lifecycle_stage.description: Lifecycle stage label, e.g. Larva, Juvenile, Adult.

group.description: Optional grouping label for related organisms.

notes.description: Optional author notes or additional metadata.
